form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at York on April 6 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Missile Girl carrying 61.5kg at $2.90. The start before that 4th in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 6 len behind Marines Cry with 59.5kg at $6.50. Not far from the winner last time and among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Recent form sound. Most recently rolled along in front before being edged out 3rd of 10 at York on April 6 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Missile Girl carrying 61.5kg at $2.90. The start before that 4th in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 6 len behind Marines Cry with 59.5kg at $6.50. Not far from the winner last time and among the chances on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 14th of 16 at Belmont Park Prov Champ Fnl May 17 over 1400m, 7 len behind Camera Action carrying 56kg at $41. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Bunbury Cl3 February 16 2025 over 1100m, 6 len behind Hymns Of Eladdair carrying 57.5kg at $91. Prefer to see how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Resuming. Finished off last preparation 14th of 16 at Belmont Park Prov Champ Fnl May 17 over 1400m, 7 len behind Camera Action carrying 56kg at $41. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Bunbury Cl3 February 16 2025 over 1100m, 6 len behind Hymns Of Eladdair carrying 57.5kg at $91. Prefer to see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stood flat footed at the start, losing several lengths.
Dwelt on jumping losing considerable ground.

form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start from last on the turn 5th of 8 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl5 on March 5 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Prawns Eleven carrying 53.5kg at $13. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Good Vibes carrying 61.5kg at $15. Will need to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start from last on the turn 5th of 8 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl5 on March 5 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Prawns Eleven carrying 53.5kg at $13. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at York on March 2 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Good Vibes carrying 61.5kg at $15. Will need to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin, losing 2L. Lay inwards in the straight.
Slow into stride, losing 1L. Lay outwards in the straight.
Slow into stride. Crowded over the concluding stages.
Passing the 50m, taken Wizard Of Oz in.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at York on April 6 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Masamune with 54.5kg at $6. Before that got back early 3rd in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Marines Cry with 56.5kg at $5.50. Plenty to like about her prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Recent form sound. Last start raced on the pace when 3rd of 9 at York on April 6 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Masamune with 54.5kg at $6. Before that got back early 3rd in a small field at York on March 15 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Marines Cry with 56.5kg at $5.50. Plenty to like about her prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards to continue into clear running approaching the 250m.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Kalgoorlie Rtg 58+ on April 3 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Marines Cry with 56.5kg at $4.80. The start before that 3rd of 9 at York on March 2 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Marines Cry with 58.5kg at $4.20. Thereabouts last time out. Rates highly and can break through.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Recent form sound. The start before that 3rd of 9 at York on March 2 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Marines Cry with 58.5kg at $4.20. Thereabouts last time out. Rates highly and can break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Bumped and unbalanced passing the 200m.
Lay inwards in the straight. Commenced a wide run from approaching the 600m.
Unable to secure clear running for the majority of the straight.

form.formComment: Most recently 13th of 15 at Albany Cl2 on April 5 over 1230m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Time Connection carrying 57.5kg at $51. The race before that eased back early on 8th of 10 at Pinjarra Cl1 on March 22 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Roaming America with 58.5kg at $91. Is capable on his day and is not out of it.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 11 at Albany Cl2 on March 19 over 1230m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Cruise To Rio with 56.5kg at $9.50. The run before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 11 at Bunbury Cl1 on February 12 over 1400m, 5 len behind Hope To Rule carrying 57kg at $10. Better placed and expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up momentarily on straightening. Lay outwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months ran last of 7 at Dongara Rtg 56+ on April 4 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Mrs Kangaroo with 54.5kg at $61. Previously second-up 8th of 10 at Port Hedland Cl3 on August 3 over 1300m, 14 len behind Novatorio carrying 55.5kg at $41. Didn't do enough first up to raise hopes.
